_planted_violations_for_demo: IND-GENDER-CODED (asks for young male candidates only)
IND-CASTE-RELIGION (prefers vegetarian Hindu household / 'right cultural background')
IND-MATERNITY-MARITAL (unmarried preferred; no marriage plans for 2 years)
IND-DISABILITY-RPWD (must be able-bodied; lift 25 kg without accommodation clause)
IND-HIV-MEDICAL (compulsory HIV test and full medical fitness check before joining)
IND-AGE-BAR (under 28; freshers only with 0-2 years experience cap)
job_posting:
Software Engineer — Acme Robotics Pvt. Ltd. (Bengaluru, Karnataka; on-site)

We are hiring male candidates only — young, energetic, fresh out of college (0-2 years experience) and below 28 years of age. The ideal applicant is a digital native who lives and breathes code. He will be the founding engineer on our hardware-integration team.

We prefer Hindu only candidates from a vegetarian household only — the right cultural background and community matter to our founders. Female applicants may also apply, but only if unmarried with no marriage plans for at least the next 2 years.

Responsibilities: build and ship backend services, work closely with the hardware team, and occasionally help lift and reposition 25 kg server racks in the on-site lab — applicants must be able-bodied and in perfect health, with no medical conditions.

Before joining, all selected candidates must clear a compulsory HIV test and a full medical fitness check arranged by our HR team. Please also share your current and expected CTC in your application.

Requirements: B.Tech or B.E. in CS, fluency in Python and Go, comfort with Linux.

criteria.name: Culture fit
criteria.note: Does the candidate feel like one of us? Would the team enjoy chai with them?
